text:
Market today: Cautious mood. Micron's fall suggests chip sector concern; Trump's threats add general market uncertainty.

Your holdings: SOXL (-38.84%) and SPAL (-21.19%) are both leveraged and below their stated stops, needing immediate attention. SMH (-10.15%) is also flagged for trim, and chip sector news is a headwind. Remember margin amplifies drops.

Watch: Closely monitor SOXL and SPAL stops. Watch for further downside in the chip sector following Micron's news.

Bottom line: Prioritize aggressive risk management on leveraged positions, especially those already past their stops, given sector headwinds and market uncertainty.
plays: SOXL: Your SOXL is significantly below its stop at 200. Given its leveraged nature and deep loss, consider exiting or reducing this position immediately.
SPAL: Your SPAL is also below its stop at 21.38. Re-evaluate this leveraged new position, as it's already past its protective stop.
CRWD: The scanner flags CRWD for accumulation (entry 194.71-193.6, stop 190.66). Consider adding to your existing profitable position if conviction is high.
